name: MAG Silver Corp.
description: MAG Silver Corp. was a silver-focused mining company holding a 44% joint venture interest in the Juanicipio underground silver mine in Chihuahua, Mexico, operated by Fresnillo plc (56%). Juanicipio is a large-scale, high-grade primary silver mine with head grades averaging above 500 g/t silver in key zones. MAG Silver was acquired by Pan American Silver Corp. in September 2025 for approximately US$2.1 billion and is no longer an independent publicly traded company.
